metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

TECH-H001.title: Public _addCredIdPerAddress/_removeCredIdPerAddress Allow Permanent DoS on Share Sales
TECH-H001.duplicate_group_description: Public _addCredIdPerAddress/_removeCredIdPerAddress allow any external caller to corrupt per-address cred tracking arrays, permanently DoS-ing share sells

TECH-H002.title: Unsigned Quantity in signatureClaim/merkleClaim Allows Arbitrary NFT Minting
TECH-H002.duplicate_group_description: Mint quantity (mintArgs_.quantity) is not included in the signed encodeData_ or Merkle leaf, allowing any valid proof holder to mint up to maxSupply

ECON-H003.title: buyShareCredFor Enables Continuous Sell-Lock Griefing on Any Curator
ECON-H003.duplicate_group_description: buyShareCredFor/batchBuyShareCred sets lastTradeTimestamp for the curator_ parameter (not msg.sender), enabling continuous sell-lock griefing

TECH-H004.title: Unbounded Loop in CuratorRewardsDistributor.distribute() Causes Permanent Fund Lock
TECH-H004.duplicate_group_description: CuratorRewardsDistributor.distribute() has unbounded loop over all curators causing gas limit DoS and permanent reward lock

ECON-H007.title: withdrawFor Allows Forced Withdrawal of Any User's PhiRewards Balance Without Authorization
ECON-H007.duplicate_group_description: RewardControl.withdrawFor lacks access control, allowing anyone to force-withdraw any user's reward balance

ECON-H005.title: Excess ETH Permanently Trapped in PhiFactory via claim() Self-Call Pattern
ECON-H005.duplicate_group_description: PhiFactory.claim() self-call pattern traps excess ETH with no refund to original caller

TECH-H007.title: credMerkleRoot Overwrite When Creating New Art for Same CredId Invalidates Existing Claims
TECH-H007.duplicate_group_description: credMerkleRoot[credChainId][credId] shared across all arts for same credId is overwritten when new art is created, invalidating existing Merkle claims

TECH-H008.title: Share Manipulation Before distribute() Extracts Disproportionate Curator Rewards
TECH-H008.duplicate_group_description: Strategic share accumulation before distribute() call allows disproportionate curator reward capture

TECH-H009.title: BondingCurve._getCreatorFee Missing Return Statement Causes Incorrect Price Quotes
TECH-H009.duplicate_group_description: BondingCurve._getCreatorFee missing return statement at supply==0 causes incorrect price quotes in view functions

OPS2-H009.title: Cross-Chain Replay of Credential Creation Signatures
OPS2-H009.duplicate_group_description: Cred.createCred signature does not include block.chainid, enabling cross-chain replay

TECH-H011.title: BondingCurve.setCredContract Not Called in Deployment Script Causes All Trades to Fail
TECH-H011.duplicate_group_description: BondingCurve.setCredContract not called in deployment script, causing all trades to revert on address(0) calls

TECH-H013.title: Unbounded protocolFeePercent can make sells revert (funds effectively trapped) due to fee underflow on sell payout
TECH-H013.duplicate_group_description: Unbounded protocolFeePercent can cause sell payout underflow, trapping curator funds

ECON-H009.title: Missing Reentrancy Guard on Individual Share Trades Enables Cross-Function Reentrancy
ECON-H009.duplicate_group_description: Individual buy/sell share functions lack nonReentrant modifier while performing external ETH transfers, enabling cross-function reentrancy

OPS-H014.title: Any caller can drain CuratorRewardsDistributor 'royaltyfee' incentive by calling distribute() and receiving protocol cut + dust
OPS-H014.duplicate_group_description: CuratorRewardsDistributor.distribute() sends royaltyfee + rounding dust to msg.sender (arbitrary caller) instead of protocol treasury

OPS-H018.title: BondingCurve curve formula can revert near asymptote, potentially freezing buys/sells at high supply and locking curator liquidity
OPS-H018.duplicate_group_description: BondingCurve._curve division by (TOTAL_SUPPLY_FACTOR - targetAmount_) can revert near asymptote at high supply

ECON-H023.title: Artist Can Retroactively Soulbind NFTs to Prevent Secondary Market Sales
ECON-H023.duplicate_group_description: Artist can retroactively toggle soulBounded flag via updateArtSettings, locking or unlocking previously minted NFTs

ECON2-H002.title: Attacker Can Drain Trapped Factory ETH to Mint NFTs for Free
ECON2-H002.duplicate_group_description: PhiFactory.claim() can use factory's own trapped ETH balance for minting when msg.value < mintFee due to self-call pattern

ECON-H012.title: handleRewardsAndGetValueSent Lacks Access Control Enabling Fake Reward Event Pollution
ECON-H012.duplicate_group_description: PhiRewards.handleRewardsAndGetValueSent has no access control, enabling fake reward event pollution and curator reward manipulation

TECH2-H008.title: PhiFactory.claim/batchClaim self-call flow can trap user ETH (excess value not refunded to original caller)
TECH2-H008.duplicate_group_description: getPositionsForCurator uses absolute index i (starting at start_) to write into array sized (stopIndex-start_), causing out-of-bounds revert when start_>0

OPS-H019.title: Claimable helper decodes calldata directly and forwards to PhiFactory, enabling malformed calldata griefing and unexpected revert propagation in integrators
OPS-H019.duplicate_group_description: Claimable helper functions blindly forward msg.value and decoded calldata to PhiFactory, enabling griefing via malformed inputs

TECH-H003.title: buyShareCredFor Enables Continuous Lock Period Griefing Against Any Curator

TECH-H005.title: withdrawFor Allows Unauthorized Forced Withdrawal of Any User's Reward Balance

TECH-H006.title: PhiFactory.claim() Traps Excess ETH With No User Refund Path

TECH-H010.title: createCred Signature Lacks Chain ID Allowing Cross-Chain Replay

TECH-H012.title: Unbounded protocolFeePercent Can Make Sells Impossible Due to Underflow

TECH-H014.title: Cred buy/sell reentrancy via ETH transfers (single-trade path lacks nonReentrant) may enable cross-function state manipulation

TECH-H015.title: Incorrect array writes in getCuratorData() can leak stale entries or return malformed curator pages used in distribution logic

TECH-H016.title: BondingCurve price formula can revert near asymptote (TOTAL_SUPPLY_FACTOR - targetAmount_ == 0) creating trade DoS at high supplies

TECH-H017.title: PhiNFT1155.createArtFromFactory can underflow/refund-revert if artCreateFee > msg.value, enabling DoS of art creation (factory passes msg.value blindly)

TECH-H018.title: RewardControl.deposit uses unchecked addition: extreme deposits could overflow balances and break reward solvency accounting

ECON-H011.title: Gas Limit DoS on CuratorRewardsDistributor.distribute() with Many Curators Permanently Locks Rewards

ECON-H013.title: Cryptographic Proofs Do Not Commit to Mint Quantity Allowing Complete Supply Exhaustion

ECON-H014.title: Cross-Chain Signature Replay Allows Unauthorized Minting of Arbitrary Arts

ECON-H015.title: Public Access to Cred Tracking Arrays Allows Permanent Locking of Victim Shares

ECON-H016.title: Malicious Actor Can Permanently Lock Victim's Shares via batchBuyShareCred Griefing

ECON-H018.title: Users Can Mint NFTs for Free by Draining Factory's Accumulated ETH

ECON-H019.title: Precision Loss in distribute() Allows Callers to Steal Curator Rewards

ECON-H020.title: Unbounded Protocol Fee Can Cause Sell Underflow, Trapping All Curator Funds

ECON-H021.title: Advanced Token URIs Are Lost on Secondary Market Transfer

OPS-H002.title: Unsigned Quantity in signatureClaim and merkleClaim Allows Minting Entire Supply with Single Valid Proof

OPS-H011.title: Artist Can Toggle Soulbound Status After Minting, Retroactively Locking or Unlocking Already-Distributed Tokens

OPS-H012.title: BondingCurve.setCredContract Commented Out in Deployment Script Leaves credContract as address(0) Breaking All Trade Operations

OPS-H013.title: Unbounded signature/merkle claim minting allows eligible user to mint arbitrary quantity (including maxSupply) by modifying unsigned mintArgs

OPS-H015.title: Public single-trade functions in Cred lack nonReentrant and perform ETH transfers + external calls, enabling same-tx reentrancy into other state-changing entrypoints

OPS-H016.title: PhiFactory missing fee parameter validation allows artist to set mintFee arbitrarily high, causing user fund traps/UX failure during claim flows

OPS-H017.title: PhiNFT1155.safeBatchTransferFrom lacks array length equality checks, risking unexpected revert behavior and operational transfer failures
